description: human_disposed=true with a non-human (policy) approver in parsed bytes: §6 makes this a structurally-guaranteed invariant, so the verifier reports a NON-GATING defensive warning; ok still reflects the gating checks (here, true).

findings.detail: human_disposed=true with a non-human approver (§5.4). Structurally unconstructable by a conforming producer; reported as a non-gating defensive warning, not a §6 gating check.
